# Kpr Institute Of Engineering And Technology (KPRIET) Coimbatore
### Description
KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET) is in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. It was established in 2009 by KPR Charities. The institute occupies 66 acres. KPRIET is an autonomous and unaided private institute. It is affiliated with Anna University, Chennai.

KPRIET offers 8 undergraduate programs, 4 postgraduate programs and 6 PhD programs. The institute has 12 academic departments with research centers in different engineering and pure science fields. It employs 260 faculty members and has around 3,500 students. There are also 280 administrative and support staff.

Facilities at KPRIET include smart classrooms, modern laboratories, high-speed wireless internet, auditoriums and seminar halls. The institute features a large centralized library, sports facilities and a gym.

Institute accepts TNEA scores for BE/BTech admissions and CEETA PG scores for MTech. KPRIET is approved by AICTE and accredited by NAAC with "A" grade. The courses also have NBA approval.

In 2023, KPRIET ranked 101 among 200 engineering colleges and 151 overall in India according to NIRF.

Placements- Over 450 students have secured placements in multinational companies. The highest CTC was Rs 20 LPA while the average CTC offered was Rs 4.2 LPA.

Home**Engineering College of the Year 2021

Engineering College of the Year 2021

**Imparting Experience-based Engineering Expertise**

The shift from offline to the online mode of teaching was a behavior change and both learners and educators took time to adapt to this “new normal”. While going online was a brilliant way to provide access to quality education anytime and anywhere, staying up to date with the societal trends and demands, and still preparing students towards becoming tomorrow’s engineers was a challenge to many institutions and colleges across India. While many engineering hubs slowly steered their way out of the sticky situations and continued on this very path of reinventing themselves day-in and day-out, institutes like KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology overtook the hurdles which came along with the pandemic effortlessly, and moved towards globalized standards of education with remarkable academic records, despite a global pandemic knocking on our doorsteps.

Striving on its mission of offering value based education, while enriching research and its impressive collaborations with industries, at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET) social responsibility is upheld with vigor and enthusiasm. Moreover, having imbibed the vision of becoming a premier institute of academic excellence by imparting technical, intellectual and professional skills to the students, the institution has received accolades at National and International levels in terms of Academia, Entrepreneurship, and Industry Partnership etc. The institution also possesses an incredible placement record with 500+ placement offers from Top MNC Giants, who visit the KPRIET campus, year after year.

A NBA and NAAC accredited institution with an A grade, KPRIET maintains its uniqueness when it comes to developing and honing young students into capable engineering professionals of tomorrow, who are not only thorough theorists but also qualified technical personalities. Additionally, the centers of excellence present on the KPRIET campus are modern in structure and function, and are built in unison with reputed industries and foreign universities. “**Our esteemed institution has signed MoUs with reputed organizations like LnT Edu Tech, TIE University, Roots Pvt. Ltd., Bosch, Xebia Academy, IBM, V- Guard, Propel Industries, Siemens, Aravinth Hospital, Royal Care, NHAI (National Highways Association of India), BAI (Builders Association of India) and many more**”, shares – Dr. K. P. Ramasamy, the Chairman of the institute and the KPR Group. Adding to his above statement and continuing on how KPRIET extends its branches beyond conventional education, Dr. Ramasamy stated – “**Malaysia Taylor’s University, Kalinga University and AzerBaijan State Oil and Industry University are some of the foreign universities that are associated with us and have been offering online courses to our students**”.

**Redefining academic excellence**

An epitome of quality education that molds students into employable and skilled engineers rather than just engineering graduates, the curriculum followed at KPRIET is structured in a certain way that it encompasses multiple parameters such as professional courses, value added courses, elective courses, liberal arts courses etc. The choice based credit system existing at the institute has enabled students to enrich their knowledge on the subject areas that interest them, and the Internal Quality Assurance Cell monitors and scrutinizes the teaching- learning and the evaluation process at regular intervals. Also, the onboard Center for Teaching Innovation and Excellence serves in streamlining the teaching – learning process in terms of accessibility and documentation, along with having a unique Learning Management System – Data on Net, which is specifically curated and designed for accessing study materials and conducting online tests.

Proud of being a home to faculty from various reputed organizations like IITs, NITs and renowned universities, almost 80% of the faculty members at KPRIET possess doctoral degrees and 20% of them are pursuing Ph.D. Operating as go-to Gurus/mentors who guide students on both personal as well as professional fronts, a 1:20 faculty-student ratio exists at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology. Furthermore, a 360 degree mentoring system is charted across all the students, where all the students are encouraged to explore their skills and talents in social space and are persuaded to compete in contests and tournaments at national level. Keeping all its stakeholders informed and in-sync with the progress of their wards and the institute, a close association is maintained with the parents, informing them about the functionalities and services of the institute. The parents are duly intimated on the progress and challenges of the students, in addition to offering solutions to the challenges.

Built amidst a serene environment on a sprawling campus, the institute is a welcome haven for engineering aspirants, irrespective of their areas of interest. Consisting of unique labs equipped with modern equipment, a full-fledged library, the institute houses exceptional skill development center, outstanding centers for excellence, spectacular academy for cinematics and graphics, KPRIET is now a leading institution for Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Chemical Engineering, Bio Medical, Civil, Computer Science, Electronics and Communication,  and many more, carefully focused on providing 21st century engineering education to students. The campus also boasts of an enormous sports stadium for indoor and outdoor games, highly furnished 3 Men’s Hostel and 3 Ladies Hostel, a gym that is built with first-hand equipment, a well maintained spa and 3 capacious and completely facilitated auditoriums. In addition, the institution embraces ICT enabled learning with smart classrooms and video lecturing methodologies, besides having a facilitated Wi-Fi throughout the campus. Various ICT tools such as MATLAB, GUVI, Google classrooms are used in the process of teaching and learning. A licensed version of ZOOM platform is made handy for lectures, online webinars and faculty development programs. A unique Learning Management System named Data – on – Net is developed in- house to facilitate the learning and evaluation process. These ICT tools have unlocked the learning curve of the KPRIET students during the pandemic, pushing and guiding everyone from students to the faculty members, to overcome the stumbling roadblocks which came along with the pandemic, enlarging the avenues of teaching and learning through ICT – enabled facilities, moving towards a larger setup of quality educational excellence.

**Dr. K. P. Ramasamy – Chairman**

An individual who is always keen on developing the skills and hidden talents among students, Dr. Ramasamy has established unique skill development centers, libraries, sports stadiums, modern laboratories for the convenience of the student community, as the Chairman of the KPR Group. Also, a philanthropist by nature, Dr. K. P. Ramasamy has touched the lives of many people. During the pandemic, his contribution to society and community has been incredible and exemplary, and a total of 2 Crores has been donated as a Chief Minister’s Covid relief fund. His voice speaks the minds of his stakeholders and he persuades the principal and the team at KPRIET towards upholding the requirements of parents and other stakeholders, working together towards a common goal of societal betterment.

# About KPRIET, KPR Institute Engineering and Technology, Autonomous Engineering Institution, Coimbatore, India
#### KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology
KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, one of India's premier institutes in Engineering and Technology was established in the year 2009. Since its inception, the Institute has been the catalyst for innovative teaching techniques, significant research, industry interaction and has emerged as a prolific institution with international standards in the region. As a proactive research institution, the students and faculty members experience world class education and develop sustainable solutions for the real-world problems. The institute has evolved to the present status with a resourceful faculty team of academic repute, highly brilliant and resolute student community, consistent technical and supporting staff and an efficient administration. KPRIET is best known as a leading centre for innovation, entrepreneurship and industrial consultancy. Realizing the dream of inclusive development, the institute contributes towards knowledge mobilization and social welfare activities like Corporate Social Responsibilities and Green Energy Initiatives. KPRIET is well represented in rankings and surveys that identify its leadership in academic performance, affordability and student satisfaction.

KPRIET is a top-notch institute with a strength of 260 eminent faculty members, 3,500 students and 280 administrative and support staff. A self-contained campus, located in a lush green environment of about 66 acres, lies in the suburbs of Coimbatore, a metropolitan city of Tamil Nadu, a southern Indian state.

The Institute has 12 academic departments with cutting-edge research centres in a variety of engineering and pure science disciplines, encompassing nearly 65 laboratories.

Centres of excellence at KPRIET focus on providing transformative learning-edge knowledge through training programmes in wide arena turning out industry ready graduates. The training programmes offered would ensure that the students are trained in accordance to the diversified needs and lazoom-icon technologies for upgrading their technical skill.

KPRIET houses smart classrooms, well equipped laboratories with state-of-the-art infrastructure, unlimited high-speed wireless internet connectivity, auditoriums and seminar halls with quality audio-visual systems that enables a pursuit of intelligibility and a centralized library with a huge repository, athletics, playground and gym facilities to enhance physical and mental abilities of the students and faculty.

The accommodation provided at KPRIET caters to the diverse needs of students community from various parts of the country. The cuisine, geographic quality, level of service and community life at KPRIET hostel meets international standards and promotes homely atmosphere.

Being an exemplary technical institution of learning, KPRIET adheres to a fair admission policy that strongly benefits meritorious students and supports education of the students from all walks of life through appropriate bursaries. KPRIET holds a strong alumni network that connects the alumni with its present fellow students through various events, every year to reminisce and share their experiences and best practices.

The students of KPRIET has been offered with unique opportunities to secure a place in the preferred area of study that would allow them to become qualified professionals in the workplace, well-rounded and socially responsible citizen of the Nation at large.

Academic alliance and Memoranda of Understanding with various International and National Universities, and industries facilitate global education amidst the learners of KPRIET. The alliances promote exchange of students, faculty and industrial experts and encourage joint research projects for mutual benefits. Students pursuing their research projects in Universities and industries have brought remarkable laurels to the Institution.

The academic courses at KPRIET are integrated with emerging trends and developments in the relevant sectors and industries meeting the societal needs at national and international horizon.

With the emergence of new-age technologies, the future holds places for enterprising and resourceful professionals with a vision to offer innovative solutions and learn beyond. KPRIET trains the young minds to work towards such a vision and marches ahead pacing the rapidly changing world to make even the impossible, possible
